subcodes.first_line: And likewise, concerning the blessed mansion of Bahji, adjacent to that hallowed spot, which for a period of thirty years [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و همچنین در قضیه قصر مبارک بهجی در جوار آن مقام که در مدت سی سال
